strategy: He resists 60% universally, so stack pierce and use a prism if needed; raw damage without pierce barely dents him.
While Malistaire and Sylvia are together the team has a -100% Virulent Plague (no healing) and Sylvia Sacrifice-heals him 2030 whenever he is damaged, so an out-heal race fails. Set up big and burst.
Avoid casting charms while Sylvia is up (Jinn's Larceny steals them) and avoid DoTs (Sylvia Mass Triage removes them). Use protected blades or straight damage.
Land one huge pierced hit that beats Sylvia's 2030 heal; eventually she Dark Pacts herself to give Malistaire a +100% Balanceblade.
Watch the random turn-order switch and the Choke and Mana Burn when they separate; keep pips banked for the burst.
cheatNotes: Turn order can randomly flip, so do not count on hitting last; plan for either order.
While Malistaire and Sylvia are together the team has a -100% Virulent Plague (no heals), so win the damage race instead of healing.
Casting a charm makes Malistaire steal it with Jinn's Larceny while Sylvia is up.
That steal does not happen when he has no minion (Sylvia gone).
When alone he self-removes 25% health and AoE Mana Burns the team, stripping a shadow pip.
He resummons Sylvia with a Shadow spell and Chokes the whole team.
Damaging Malistaire makes Sylvia Sacrifice-heal him 2030, so your hit must beat that heal to make progress.
Casting a DoT makes Sylvia cast Mass Triage and clear it, so avoid DoTs.
Eventually Sylvia Dark Pacts herself to hand Malistaire a +100% Balanceblade, so expect a damage spike after.
